faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for this ICAR recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Project Research Scientist- II. This is a contract-based position within the ICAR-Indian Agricultural Research Institute.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Research Scientist- II position. This is a direct walk-in interview opportunity.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a Post Graduate degree, including an integrated PG degree, in specified disciplines like Food Technology, Dairy Technology, Biochemistry, etc., with three years of post-qualification experience, or a PhD in the mentioned fields.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for this post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 67000/- per month plus 30% HRA, totaling Rs. 87100/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a walk-in interview process. Eligible candidates need to report directly at the specified venue on the interview date with all required documents.

faq.question: Q6. When is the walk-in interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled to be held on 03rd July 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q7. What is the last date to submit a soft copy of the application?
faq.answer: The deadline to submit a soft copy of the application via email is 01st July 2026. Ensure your application is sent before this date.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the Division of Food Science and Post Harvest Technology, Indian Agricultural Research Institute, Pusa Campus, New Delhi 110 012.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.
